docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITY PACIFIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR JUDGMENT GRANTED - 2 - JUDGE QUIDACHAY.

STIPULATION AND ORDER WAS ENTERED ON 5-16-95 WITH A CHECK FOR $14.00 BY MISTAKE ON CASE#116244; A CHECK FOR $66.00 WAS ENTERED ON CASE#117858 TO MAKE UP THE TOTAL FOR THE FIRST APPEARANCE FEE BY PLAINTIFF UNITY PACIFIC, INC.
DECLARATION OF J. WANG IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JGMENT OF THE COURT PURSUANT TO STIP FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITY PACIFIC, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF POS OF DECL. OF JACKSON WANG RE:EX-PARTE APPLICATION FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITY PACIFIC, INC. SERVED OCT-16-1995, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, JOHN

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITY PACIFIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STONE, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1000 HOWARD STREET, APT. #304, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,171.32 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,941.32, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.02 FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITY PACIFIC, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, JOHN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, JOHN
